name: serenissima-harness
description: A self-evolving, natural-language harness that runs a digital society of agents — no single agent decides alone.

plugins.name: serenissima-harness
plugins.description: Blackboard task DAG, TTL write-locks, producer-vs-approver enforcement, bounded goal-mode loops, and a human-gated evolution loop — coordination rules as refusals, not promises.
